name: Broccoli and Cheese Omelet
recipeIngredient: 10 oz pkg frozen chopped broccoli, thawed and drained
1 slice white bread, toasted, cut into 5 strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat, cook broccoli, onion, and garlic in chicken broth.
2. Stir in cottage cheese, oregano, and pepper. Remove from skillet and keep warm.
3. In the same skillet over medium heat, cook half of the egg substitute in 1 tsp liquid Butter Buds.
4. When almost set, sprinkle a quarter of the cheese over the cooked egg. Remove from skillet and keep warm.
5. Repeat with the other half of the egg substitute and cheese.
6. To assemble, place one round cooked egg mixture on a platter.
7. Spoon filling on top.
8. Place the other cooked egg mixture on top of the filling.
9. Sprinkle the rest of the grated cheese on top.
10. Bake at 425°F for 5 minutes or until the top is set and golden brown.
11. Garnish with toast strips. Cut into wedges and serve immediately.
